samples.xml_description:
<module id="adder_pipe_64bit">
    <description>Implement a module of a 64-bit ripple carry adder, which includes several registers to enable the pipeline stages.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock input</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active low reset signal</input>
        <input id="i_en">Enable signal for addition operation</input>
        <input id="adda" width_description="[63:0]">64-bit input operand A</input>
        <input id="addb" width_description="[63:0]">64-bit input operand B</input>
        <output id="result" width_description="[64:0]">65-bit output representing the sum of adda and addb.</output>
        <output id="o_en">Output enable signal.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter name="PIPELINE_STAGES" value="3">Number of pipeline stages in the adder.</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <implementation>
        <sequential_logic>
            <reg id="i_en_reg" value="0">Register to store the input enable signal.</reg>
            <reg id="adda_reg" width_description="[63:0]">Register to store the input operand A.</reg>
            <reg id="addb_reg" width_description="[63:0]">Register to store the input operand B.</reg>
            <reg id="o_en_reg" value="0">Register to store the output enable signal.</reg>
            <reg id="sum_reg" width_description="[64:0]">Register to store the sum of adda and addb.</reg>
            <always @("posedge clk or negedge rst_n")>
                <if condition="!rst_n">
                    <assign>i_en_reg = 0;</assign>
                    <assign>adda_reg = 0;</assign>
                    <assign>addb_reg = 0;</assign>
                    <assign>o_en_reg = 0;</assign>
                    <assign>sum_reg = 0;</assign>
                </if>
                <else>
                    <assign>i_en_reg = i_en;</assign>
                    <assign>adda_reg = adda;</assign>
                    <assign>addb_reg = addb;</assign>
                    <assign>o_en_reg = o_en_reg;</assign>
                    <if condition="i_en_reg">
                        <assign>sum_reg = adda_reg + addb_reg + o_en_reg;</assign>
                    </if>
                </else>
            </always>
        </sequential_logic>
        <assign>o_en = o_en_reg;</assign>
        <assign>result = sum_reg;</assign>
    </implementation>
</module>
